description:
Extract view components from App.vue:
- ColumnView.vue
- GraphViewWrapper.vue  
- VoiceView.vue
- Keep App.vue as router + layout only

Cleaner separation of concerns, easier to test views independently

status.comment: Completed App.vue decomposition: extracted `views/ColumnsView.vue` (columns rendering + viewport transform logic), `views/GraphViewWrapper.vue` (graph view wrapper), and `views/ProjectSelectionView.vue` (project selection/history UI). `App.vue` now acts as orchestration/layout shell and dropped from 841 lines to 590 lines while preserving behavior. Verification: `npm run type-check -w frontend` passed; `npm run test:unit -w frontend` passed (15 files, 60 tests).
